Trust us Ted, we're victimized more by seeing the image than you are.


The Cradle (@TheCradleMedia)

VIDEO | "I've seen many times an image of myself in a bikini with the flag of Israel."

Ted Cruz, a Republican US senator from Texas and a longtime supporter of Israel, said this week that he faces daily so-called “anti-semitic” attacks online because of his pro-Israel stance.

Speaking at an anti-semitism symposium in Washington on 10 March, Cruz claimed that even a simple post on social media

Don’t believe the former Israeli intelligence guy reporting for Axios. Trump and the rest of the administration are obedient cattle and won’t do anything against the precious Israeli genociders.

Enjoy the prices at the pump along with hyperinflation.

You swore up and down that the US wouldn’t get dragged into a war with Iran. You said you’d apologize to me if proven wrong. 

We are now at war with Iran. We bombed an elementary school and slaughtered 160+ little girls as the opening act of “liberating Iran.”

You are a fitness guru with an unbearably inauthentic vocal fry. You have no credibility on geopolitical matters. 

Tehran, a city of 10 million people, is literally on fire right now and this is the slop you whip up as analysis. Embarra

Trump discusses “liberating Iranians.”


Tymofiy Mylovanov (@Mylovanov)

CNN: Would you be OK with a religious leader in Iran?

Trump: Yes. It doesn't necessarily have to be a democratic leader in Iran. 

It just has to be somebody who treats the U.S. and Israel fairly as well as people in the countries in the rest of the Middle East.

Video

The show is in capable hands tonight! Tune in! 🤓


Glenn Greenwald (@ggreenwald)

I have heard @AnaKasparian speaking enough over the past year -- and have been on enough Piers Morgan panel with her -- that I can now not only channel her but am coming for her job. Tune in:



— https://nitter.net/ggreenwald/status/2028961814868832483#m

This is why legacy publications go out of business.


The Atlantic (@TheAtlantic)

Benjamin Netanyahu’s long career was built on conflict avoidance—then, October 7 transformed and radicalized him, @Yair_Rosenberg argues: theatlantic.com/internationa…

Community note: Netanyahu, by his own admission, has been trying to pull the US into war with Iran for decades
